scripts.tauri:build: pnpm run license:sync && pnpm run version:sync && pnpm exec tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:debug: pnpm run license:sync && pnpm run version:sync && pnpm exec tauri build --debug
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run license:check && pnpm run version:check && pnpm -r run typecheck
scripts.bundle:stage-windows: pnpm run runtime:stage-bundled-windows && pnpm run dashboard:stage-web-dist && pnpm run skills:stage-bundled
scripts.bundle:stage-macos: pnpm run runtime:stage-bundled-macos && pnpm run dashboard:stage-web-dist && pnpm run skills:stage-bundled
scripts.tauri:build:bundled-windows: pnpm run license:sync && pnpm run version:sync && pnpm run bundle:stage-windows && pnpm exec tauri build --bundles nsis
scripts.tauri:build:bundled-macos: pnpm run license:sync && pnpm run version:sync && pnpm run bundle:stage-macos && pnpm exec tauri build --bundles dmg
